title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down four rules for prompting Claude Code effectively based on studying Anthropic's internal practices. The rules emphasize prompting skills rather than the model directly, building composable and reusable skills, and iterative improvement of skills across sessions.
